title: Autodesk in the green after fiscal 1Q results meet Wall Street expectations
text: Autodesk (NASDAQ:ADSK) Inc shares inched up after the software company reported financial results for the first quarter of fiscal 2024 that were in line with Wall Street expectations. For the quarter ended April 30, 2023, the San Francisco, California-based company reported earnings of $1.55 per share on revenue of $1.3 billion.

title: Autodesk (ADSK) Q1 Earnings and Sales Meet Expectations
text: New business growth, resilient subscription renewal rates and strong competitive performance aid Autodesk's (ADSK) revenues and earnings in the first quarter of fiscal 2024.

title: Autodesk (ADSK) Q1 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
text: The headline numbers for Autodesk (ADSK) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended April 2023, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.

title: Autodesk, Inc. (ADSK) Q1 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Autodesk, Inc. title: Autodesk (ADSK) Q1 Earnings Match Estimates
text: Autodesk (ADSK) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.55 per share, in line with the Zacks Consensus Estimate. This compares to earnings of $1.43 per share a year ago.

title: Autodesk Matches First-Quarter Views But Misses With Second-Quarter Outlook
text: Autodesk met expectations for its fiscal first quarter but the software maker missed views with its outlook for the current quarter. The post Autodesk Matches First-Quarter Views But Misses With Second-Quarter Outlook appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: AUTODESK, INC. ANNOUNCES FISCAL 2024 FIRST QUARTER RESULTS
text: - First quarter revenue grew 8 percent, and 12 percent at constant exchange rates, to $1.3 billion.- Cash flow from operating activities was $723 million, up 67 percent year over year, and free cash flow was $714 million, up 69 percent.

title: Factors to Note Ahead of Autodesk's (ADSK) Q1 Earnings Release
text: Autodesk's (ADSK) fiscal Q1 performance is expected to reflect the benefits of strong demand for its software products, higher subscription revenues, steady renewals and new customer billings.

text: Autodesk (ADSK) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Autodesk Introduces Forma for Next-Generation Building Design in the Cloud
text: SAN FRANCISCO , May 8, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Autodesk, Inc. (NASDAQ: ADSK) today unveiled the first set of capabilities of Autodesk Forma, an industry cloud that will unify workflows across the teams that design, build and operate the built environment. Forma's initial capabilities target the early-stage planning and design process with automations and AI-powered insights that simplify exploration of design concepts, offload repetitive tasks, and help evaluate environmental qualities surrounding a building site, giving architects time to focus on creative solutions.

title: 5 Struggling Stocks to Buy at a Discount
